name: tech-priests
title: Tech Priests

description: Tech-Priest logistics drones, Cogitator Stations, Work State tabs, Machine-Spirit ledger traits, emergency machinery, technology-gated infrastructure planning, station-owned defense perimeters, cardinal gates, non-overlapping turret coverage, 0.1.649 physical direct-acquisition target guard, and hidden proxy-gun ammo hardening.
